headline: Lennox International: Valuation A Bit Too Hot, Upside Potential A Bit Too Cold
summary: Lennox International Inc. remains resilient despite inflationary headwinds and weak housing market conditions. Read more on LII stock here.

headline: 2 Industrials Stocks to Consider Right Now and 1 We Ignore
summary: Even if they go mostly unnoticed, industrial businesses are the backbone of our country. But their prominence also brings high exposure to the ups and downs of economic cycles. Luckily, the tide is turning in their favor as the industry’s 18.7% return over the past six months has topped the S&P 500 by 12.5 percentage points.
